footer.tagline: Trusted construction and air conditioning in Florida

hero.title: The future is built today.
hero.subtitle: General contractors with CMC and CGC licenses. Specialists in commercial construction, residential, and air conditioning in Florida.

about.title: Your all-in-one partner in construction and HVAC
about.description: Taircon Contractor is a fully licensed and insured construction company serving residential and commercial clients throughout Florida. With over 10 years of experience, we hold both the Certified Mechanical Contractor (CMC) and Certified General Contractor (CGC) licenses.
about.description2: From new construction to complete HVAC installations, our team is committed to quality, timeliness, and transparent communication from start to finish. We treat every project as if it were our own.

services.title: Complete Construction Solutions
services.subtitle: Comprehensive services with CGC and CMC licenses for residential and commercial projects in Florida
services.commercialDesc: Offices, retail spaces, and buildings. Full project management with building code compliance.
services.residentialDesc: Single-family and multi-family homes with quality materials and flawless finishes.
services.renovationDesc: Kitchens, bathrooms, additions, and complete structural renovations.
services.acCommercialDesc: Installation and maintenance of HVAC systems. We optimize your energy efficiency.
services.acResidentialDesc: Residential air conditioning systems. Year-round comfort guaranteed.
services.permitsDesc: We handle all permits. Experience with Florida local and state regulations.
services.plansDesc: We create custom plans and designs tailored to each project. Complete technical drawings for construction, renovations, and permits, complying with the Florida Building Code and local regulations. From initial concepts to permit-ready plans, we cover the entire process with precision and professionalism.

ac.title: Residential and Commercial Air Conditioning
ac.subtitle: HVAC-licensed company (CMC) with reliable and efficient solutions throughout Florida.
ac.description: We are a certified air conditioning and refrigeration company with a CMC license in Florida. We specialize in the installation, service, repair, and maintenance of climate control systems for homes, offices, and commercial properties.
ac.description2: All our work complies with the Florida Mechanical Code and local regulations, ensuring safety, energy efficiency, and durability.
ac.feature1Desc: New systems installed according to the Florida Mechanical Code.
ac.feature2Desc: Efficient diagnosis and repair of any system failure.
ac.feature3Desc: Periodic plans that ensure energy efficiency and long service life.
ac.feature4Desc: Professional installation, modification, and cleaning of ductwork.

hero.title: Taircon Contractor
hero.subtitle: Licensed (CMC & CGC) and insured company, specialized in construction and air conditioning in Florida.

story.title: From a vision to hundreds of projects
story.p1: Taircon Contractor is a fully licensed and insured construction company serving residential and commercial clients throughout Florida. With over 10 years of experience, we hold both the Certified Mechanical Contractor (CMC) and Certified General Contractor (CGC) licenses, allowing us to handle every aspect of your project under one roof.
story.p2: From new construction to complete HVAC installations, our team is committed to quality workmanship, on-time delivery, and transparent communication from start to finish. We treat every project as if it were our own.

values.title: What defines us
values.subtitle: Principles that guide every decision, every build, and every A/C installation we undertake
values.excellenceDesc: Every project — construction or HVAC — reflects our highest quality standards.
values.trustDesc: Long-lasting relationships built on honesty, transparency, and straightforward advice.
values.efficiencyDesc: Low-consumption A/C systems and energy-efficient builds to save on your utility bills.
values.punctualityDesc: We deliver every project on the agreed date, whether a renovation or an HVAC installation.
values.innovationDesc: We adopt the latest construction techniques and the most modern climate control equipment on the market.
values.complianceDesc: All our work complies with the Florida Mechanical Code and current local regulations.

timeline.title: Milestones we're proud of
timeline.e2014: Taircon Contractor founded in Miami, FL with CGC license.
timeline.e2017: Obtained CMC license — expansion into HVAC and air conditioning services.
timeline.e2019: First large-scale commercial project in South Florida.
timeline.e2021: Over 100 projects completed across construction and HVAC.
timeline.e2023: Service expansion: commercial build-outs and industrial HVAC systems.
timeline.e2024: Over 200 projects completed. Recognized by clients across Florida.

team.title: A team committed to your project
team.desc: Certified professionals (CMC & CGC) in construction and HVAC, passionate about excellence in every job.

hero.title: Construction & Air Conditioning
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive construction and HVAC solutions for residential and commercial projects in Miami and South Florida.

construction.title: Construction Services
construction.subtitle: Comprehensive solutions for residential and commercial projects in South Florida

s1.title: General Construction (CGC)
s1.desc: We build and renovate commercial and residential properties to the highest standards. From ground-up construction to structural renovations, we manage every phase of your project.

s2.title: Commercial Build-Outs
s2.desc: Offices, retail spaces, warehouses, and more. We transform empty spaces into fully functional, code-compliant environments.

s3.title: Residential Renovations
s3.desc: Kitchens, bathrooms, additions, and complete renovations. We bring your vision to life with quality materials and expert craftsmanship.

s4.title: Plans & Designs
s4.desc: We offer custom plan and design services tailored to each project. We develop complete technical drawings for construction, renovations, and permits, complying with the Florida Building Code and local regulations. From initial concepts to permit-ready plans, we handle the entire process with precision and professionalism.
s4.f1: Plans for residential and commercial projects

s5.title: Permits & Inspections
s5.desc: We handle all permits and coordinate inspections so you don't have to worry about paperwork or code compliance.

hvac.title: Air Conditioning Services
hvac.subtitle: HVAC-licensed company — installation, repair, and maintenance in South Florida
hvac.compliance: All our air conditioning services comply with the Florida Mechanical Code and current local regulations. Licensed and insured company.

s1.title: Air Conditioning & HVAC (CMC)
s1.desc: Installation, replacement, and maintenance of residential and commercial A/C systems. We work with all major brands and optimize energy efficiency.

s2.title: Commercial A/C
s2.desc: Climate control solutions for businesses: rooftop units, commercial split systems, and maintenance contracts. CMC license in Florida.

s3.title: A/C Repairs
s3.desc: Fast diagnosis and repair of any failure in your residential or commercial climate control system. Emergency service available.

s4.title: Preventive Maintenance
s4.desc: Periodic maintenance plans to extend the life of your system and ensure energy efficiency all year round.

process.title: How we work
process.subtitle: A clear and transparent process from the first meeting to final delivery
process.step1Desc: We analyze your project and needs at no cost.
process.step2Desc: We deliver plans, materials, and a detailed budget.
process.step3Desc: Our team works with precision and punctuality.
process.step4Desc: Final walkthrough with you and written warranty.
